dcterms:title: Battery Data Format Table Schema
dcterms:description: A reusable table schema for Battery Data Format (BDF) compliant CSV files, supporting interoperability across battery test data systems
schema:description: Standard table schema for battery cycling test data in CSV format
csvw:notes: At least one of 'test_time_second' or 'unix_time_second' must be present in a compliant BDF file. CSVW does not support cross-column conditional constraints natively; this requirement is enforced by BDF validators and expressed formally in the accompanying SHACL shapes.
skos:note: Column co-occurrence constraint: a compliant BDF file must contain at least one of test_time_second (elapsed time from test start) or unix_time_second (wall-clock Unix timestamp). Both may be present simultaneously.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: test_time_millisecond
csvw:columns.skos:note: This column is maintained for legacy compatibility. It is superseded by test_time_second.
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Elapsed time since the start of the test, in milliseconds
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Elapsed time since the start of the test, in milliseconds

csvw:columns.csvw:name: test_time_second
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Elapsed time since the start of the test, in seconds
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Elapsed time since the start of the test, in seconds

csvw:columns.csvw:name: unix_time_second
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Timestamp of the measurement in Unix time (second since Jan 1, 1970 UTC). Used to align data.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Timestamp of the measurement in Unix time (second since Jan 1, 1970 UTC). Used to align data.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: unix_time_millisecond
csvw:columns.skos:note: This column is maintained for legacy compatibility. It is superseded by unix_time_second.
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Timestamp of the measurement in Unix time (millisecond since Jan 1, 1970 UTC). Used to align data.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Timestamp of the measurement in Unix time (millisecond since Jan 1, 1970 UTC). Used to align data.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: voltage_volt
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Instantaneous voltage measured across the test object, in volts
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Instantaneous voltage measured across the test object, in volts

csvw:columns.csvw:name: current_ampere
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Instantaneous current applied to or from the test object, in amperes
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Instantaneous current applied to or from the test object, in amperes

csvw:columns.csvw:name: surface_temperature_celsius
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Temperature measured at the surface of the test object, in degree Celsius, regardless of sensor channel.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Temperature measured at the surface of the test object, in degree Celsius, regardless of sensor channel.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: temperature_t1_celsius
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: For tests with multiple temperature measurements, the measured temperature of the test object (e.g., surface or internal), in degrees Celsius.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: For tests with multiple temperature measurements, the measured temperature of the test object (e.g., surface or internal), in degrees Celsius.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: temperature_t2_celsius
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: For tests with multiple temperature measurements, the measured temperature of the test object (e.g., surface or internal), in degrees Celsius.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: For tests with multiple temperature measurements, the measured temperature of the test object (e.g., surface or internal), in degrees Celsius.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: temperature_t3_celsius
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: For tests with multiple temperature measurements, the measured temperature of the test object (e.g., surface or internal), in degrees Celsius.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: For tests with multiple temperature measurements, the measured temperature of the test object (e.g., surface or internal), in degrees Celsius.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: temperature_t4_celsius
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: For tests with multiple temperature measurements, the measured temperature of the test object (e.g., surface or internal), in degrees Celsius.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: For tests with multiple temperature measurements, the measured temperature of the test object (e.g., surface or internal), in degrees Celsius.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: temperature_t5_celsius
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: For tests with multiple temperature measurements, the measured temperature of the test object (e.g., surface or internal), in degrees Celsius.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: For tests with multiple temperature measurements, the measured temperature of the test object (e.g., surface or internal), in degrees Celsius.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: ambient_temperature_celsius
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Temperature of the surrounding environment, in degree Celsius.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Temperature of the surrounding environment, in degree Celsius.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: cycle_count
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Sequential index of the current cycle in the test program, starting from 1
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Sequential index of the current cycle in the test program, starting from 1

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_count
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Index of the current step in the test sequence
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Index of the current step in the test sequence

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_record_index
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: 1-based positional counter for data points within a step. Resets to 1 at the start of each new step and increments by 1 for each subsequent recorded data point. This is the within-step data-point counter, not the program step identifier: an instrument column named 'Step Index' (e.g. Arbin Step_Index) maps to step_id, not to this property.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: 1-based positional counter for data points within a step. Resets to 1 at the start of each new step and increments by 1 for each subsequent recorded data point. This is the within-step data-point counter, not the program step identifier: an instrument column named 'Step Index' (e.g. Arbin Step_Index) maps to step_id, not to this property.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_index
csvw:columns.skos:note: This column is maintained for legacy compatibility. It is superseded by step_record_index.
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: 1-based positional counter for data points within a step. Resets to 1 at the start of each new step and increments by 1 for each subsequent recorded data point. This is the within-step data-point counter, not the program step identifier: an instrument column named 'Step Index' (e.g. Arbin Step_Index) maps to step_id, not to this property.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: 1-based positional counter for data points within a step. Resets to 1 at the start of each new step and increments by 1 for each subsequent recorded data point. This is the within-step data-point counter, not the program step identifier: an instrument column named 'Step Index' (e.g. Arbin Step_Index) maps to step_id, not to this property.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_id
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: The step identifier as defined in the test program or schedule file. Values are instrument-defined and are not required to be contiguous or monotonically increasing; the same step ID may recur in successive cycles. Known equivalents: Arbin Step_Index, Neware Step_ID, Digatron Step, BioLogic Ns.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: The step identifier as defined in the test program or schedule file. Values are instrument-defined and are not required to be contiguous or monotonically increasing; the same step ID may recur in successive cycles. Known equivalents: Arbin Step_Index, Neware Step_ID, Digatron Step, BioLogic Ns.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_type
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: A string label describing the operational mode of the current test step, as reported by the cycler software. Common values include CC_CHG (constant-current charge), CC_DCH (constant-current discharge), CV_CHG (constant-voltage charge), CCCV_CHG, REST, OCV, and EIS. The controlled vocabulary is not yet standardised; values should be preserved as reported by the instrument.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: A string label describing the operational mode of the current test step, as reported by the cycler software. Common values include CC_CHG (constant-current charge), CC_DCH (constant-current discharge), CV_CHG (constant-voltage charge), CCCV_CHG, REST, OCV, and EIS. The controlled vocabulary is not yet standardised; values should be preserved as reported by the instrument.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: charging_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Electric charge transferred into the test object during charging, in ampere hour.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Electric charge transferred into the test object during charging, in ampere hour.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: discharging_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Electric charge transferred out of the test object during discharging, in ampere hour.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Electric charge transferred out of the test object during discharging, in ampere hour.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_cumulative_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Running accumulation of charge throughput within the current test step, in ampere hour. Monotonically non-decreasing within the step; resets to zero at each step transition.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Running accumulation of charge throughput within the current test step, in ampere hour. Monotonically non-decreasing within the step; resets to zero at each step transition.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.skos:note: This column is maintained for legacy compatibility. It is superseded by step_cumulative_capacity_ah.
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Running accumulation of charge throughput within the current test step, in ampere hour. Monotonically non-decreasing within the step; resets to zero at each step transition.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Running accumulation of charge throughput within the current test step, in ampere hour. Monotonically non-decreasing within the step; resets to zero at each step transition.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: net_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Net capacity difference between charge and discharge within a defined step or cycle, in ampere hour.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Net capacity difference between charge and discharge within a defined step or cycle, in ampere hour.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: cumulative_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Total electric charge that has passed through the test object since the start of the test, in ampere hour.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Total electric charge that has passed through the test object since the start of the test, in ampere hour.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_cumulative_energy_wh
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Running accumulation of energy throughput within the current test step, in watt hour. Monotonically non-decreasing within the step; resets to zero at each step transition.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Running accumulation of energy throughput within the current test step, in watt hour. Monotonically non-decreasing within the step; resets to zero at each step transition.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_energy_wh
csvw:columns.skos:note: This column is maintained for legacy compatibility. It is superseded by step_cumulative_energy_wh.
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Running accumulation of energy throughput within the current test step, in watt hour. Monotonically non-decreasing within the step; resets to zero at each step transition.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Running accumulation of energy throughput within the current test step, in watt hour. Monotonically non-decreasing within the step; resets to zero at each step transition.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: charging_energy_wh
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Energy transferred into the test object during charging, in watt hour.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Energy transferred into the test object during charging, in watt hour.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: discharging_energy_wh
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Energy transferred out of the test object during discharging, in watt hour.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Energy transferred out of the test object during discharging, in watt hour.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: net_energy_wh
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Net energy difference between charge and discharge within a defined step or cycle, in watt hour.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Net energy difference between charge and discharge within a defined step or cycle, in watt hour.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: cumulative_energy_wh
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Total energy transferred through the test object since the start of the test, in watt hour.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Total energy transferred through the test object since the start of the test, in watt hour.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: internal_resistance_ohm
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Measured internal resistance of the test object in ohms.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Measured internal resistance of the test object in ohms.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: ambient_pressure_pa
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Ambient atmospheric pressure in pascals during the test.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Ambient atmospheric pressure in pascals during the test.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: applied_pressure_pa
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Mechanical pressure applied to the test object during the test, in pascals.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Mechanical pressure applied to the test object during the test, in pascals.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: power_watt
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Instantaneous power calculated as the product of voltage and current, in watt.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Instantaneous power calculated as the product of voltage and current, in watt.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: absolute_impedance_ohm
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: The magnitude of the complex impedance, in ohm.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: The magnitude of the complex impedance, in ohm.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: ac_internal_resistance_ohm
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: AC internal resistance: impedance magnitude at a fixed excitation frequency, conventionally 1 kHz. Equivalent to instrument ACR outputs.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: AC internal resistance: impedance magnitude at a fixed excitation frequency, conventionally 1 kHz. Equivalent to instrument ACR outputs.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: cycle_charging_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Electric charge transferred into the test object during the charge portions of the current cycle, in ampere hour. Non-negative; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Electric charge transferred into the test object during the charge portions of the current cycle, in ampere hour. Non-negative; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: cycle_charging_energy_wh
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Energy transferred into the test object during the charge portions of the current cycle, in watt hour. Non-negative; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Energy transferred into the test object during the charge portions of the current cycle, in watt hour. Non-negative; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: cycle_cumulative_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Running accumulation of charge throughput within the current cycle, in ampere hour. Monotonically non-decreasing within the cycle; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Running accumulation of charge throughput within the current cycle, in ampere hour. Monotonically non-decreasing within the cycle; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: cycle_cumulative_energy_wh
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Running accumulation of energy throughput within the current cycle, in watt hour. Monotonically non-decreasing within the cycle; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Running accumulation of energy throughput within the current cycle, in watt hour. Monotonically non-decreasing within the cycle; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: cycle_discharging_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Electric charge transferred out of the test object during the discharge portions of the current cycle, in ampere hour. Non-negative; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Electric charge transferred out of the test object during the discharge portions of the current cycle, in ampere hour. Non-negative; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: cycle_discharging_energy_wh
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Energy transferred out of the test object during the discharge portions of the current cycle, in watt hour. Non-negative; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Energy transferred out of the test object during the discharge portions of the current cycle, in watt hour. Non-negative; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: cycle_net_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Running net capacity within the current cycle: cycle_charging_capacity_ah - cycle_discharging_capacity_ah. Can be negative; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Running net capacity within the current cycle: cycle_charging_capacity_ah - cycle_discharging_capacity_ah. Can be negative; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: cycle_net_energy_wh
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Running net energy within the current cycle: cycle_charging_energy_wh - cycle_discharging_energy_wh. Can be negative; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Running net energy within the current cycle: cycle_charging_energy_wh - cycle_discharging_energy_wh. Can be negative; resets to zero when cycle_count increments.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: dc_internal_resistance_ohm
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: DC internal resistance from the voltage response to a current step. Method parameters are instrument-specific; values from different methods are not directly comparable.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: DC internal resistance from the voltage response to a current step. Method parameters are instrument-specific; values from different methods are not directly comparable.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: frequency_hertz
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: The frequency of the applied periodic excitation or measured response, in hertz.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: The frequency of the applied periodic excitation or measured response, in hertz.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: imaginary_impedance_ohm
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: The imaginary (reactive) component of the complex impedance, in ohm. Sign as reported: negative for predominantly capacitive behaviour.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: The imaginary (reactive) component of the complex impedance, in ohm. Sign as reported: negative for predominantly capacitive behaviour.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: phase_degree
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: The phase angle of the complex impedance, representing the phase shift between voltage and current, in degree.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: The phase angle of the complex impedance, representing the phase shift between voltage and current, in degree.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: real_impedance_ohm
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: The real (resistive) component of the complex impedance, in ohm.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: The real (resistive) component of the complex impedance, in ohm.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: record_index
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: An ordinal, dimensionless integer used to order data records within a time-series dataset, incremented by one for each recorded record and carrying no physical or quantitative meaning.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: An ordinal, dimensionless integer used to order data records within a time-series dataset, incremented by one for each recorded record and carrying no physical or quantitative meaning.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: schedule_charging_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Cumulative charge transferred into the test object during charging since the most recent schedule-defined assignment event, in ampere hour
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Cumulative charge transferred into the test object during charging since the most recent schedule-defined assignment event, in ampere hour

csvw:columns.csvw:name: schedule_discharging_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Cumulative charge transferred out of the test object during discharging since the most recent schedule-defined assignment event, in ampere hour
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Cumulative charge transferred out of the test object during discharging since the most recent schedule-defined assignment event, in ampere hour

csvw:columns.csvw:name: schedule_charging_energy_wh
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Cumulative energy transferred into the test object during charging since the most recent schedule-defined assignment event, in watt hour
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Cumulative energy transferred into the test object during charging since the most recent schedule-defined assignment event, in watt hour

csvw:columns.csvw:name: schedule_discharging_energy_wh
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Cumulative energy transferred out of the test object during discharging since the most recent schedule-defined assignment event, in watt hour
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Cumulative energy transferred out of the test object during discharging since the most recent schedule-defined assignment event, in watt hour

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_charging_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Electric charge transferred into the test object during the charge portion of the current test step, in ampere hour. Non-negative; resets to zero at each step transition.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Electric charge transferred into the test object during the charge portion of the current test step, in ampere hour. Non-negative; resets to zero at each step transition.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_charging_energy_wh
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Energy transferred into the test object during the charge portion of the current test step, in watt hour. Non-negative; resets to zero at each step transition.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Energy transferred into the test object during the charge portion of the current test step, in watt hour. Non-negative; resets to zero at each step transition.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_discharging_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Electric charge transferred out of the test object during the discharge portion of the current test step, in ampere hour. Non-negative; resets to zero at each step transition.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Electric charge transferred out of the test object during the discharge portion of the current test step, in ampere hour. Non-negative; resets to zero at each step transition.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_discharging_energy_wh
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Energy transferred out of the test object during the discharge portion of the current test step, in watt hour. Non-negative; resets to zero at each step transition.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Energy transferred out of the test object during the discharge portion of the current test step, in watt hour. Non-negative; resets to zero at each step transition.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_net_capacity_ah
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Running net capacity within the current test step: step_charging_capacity_ah - step_discharging_capacity_ah. Can be negative; resets to zero at each step transition.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Running net capacity within the current test step: step_charging_capacity_ah - step_discharging_capacity_ah. Can be negative; resets to zero at each step transition.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_net_energy_wh
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Running net energy within the current test step: step_charging_energy_wh - step_discharging_energy_wh. Can be negative; resets to zero at each step transition.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Running net energy within the current test step: step_charging_energy_wh - step_discharging_energy_wh. Can be negative; resets to zero at each step transition.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: step_time_second
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Elapsed time since the beginning of the active test step, in second; resets to zero at each step transition.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Elapsed time since the beginning of the active test step, in second; resets to zero at each step transition.

csvw:columns.csvw:name: surface_pressure_pa
csvw:columns.dcterms:description: Pressure measured at the surface of the test object, in pascal. A measured quantity that may be nonzero even when no external pressure is actively applied, e.g. from cell swelling against a fixture. Distinguished from applied_pressure_pa, which is actively applied and controlled by an external agent.
csvw:columns.rdfs:comment: Pressure measured at the surface of the test object, in pascal. A measured quantity that may be nonzero even when no external pressure is actively applied, e.g. from cell swelling against a fixture. Distinguished from applied_pressure_pa, which is actively applied and controlled by an external agent.
